---
title: "nitrix.smoothing.susan"
generated: true
signature-hash: 96295ecb61c119a4
description: "SUSAN-style edge-preserving smoothing."
listing:
  id: nitrix-smoothing-susan-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-smoothing-susan/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.smoothing.susan`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
SUSAN-style edge-preserving smoothing.

[`susan_emulator`](nitrix-smoothing-susan/susan_emulator.qmd) is the convenience wrapper that composes
[`bilateral_gaussian`](nitrix-smoothing-bilateral/bilateral_gaussian.qmd) (the brightness-similarity weighting half
of FSL SUSAN) with `median_filter` (the impulse-noise fallback
half).  The user passes a raw n-D image and the wrapper does the
feature-construction internally.

Documented behavioural deltas from FSL SUSAN:

- The brightness-similarity weighting that FSL SUSAN does explicitly
  is recovered by including intensity in the bilateral feature space.
- The impulse-noise median fallback is exposed via `use_median=True`
  (default), which applies `median_filter` *before* the
  bilateral pass.  (FSL SUSAN does this internally as part of a single
  operation; here it is exposed as a chained step, in keeping with the
  practice of composing small primitives.)
- The "auto-flat-kernel at small spatial extents" behaviour of FSL
  SUSAN is *not* replicated.  `sigma_space` controls the spatial
  weighting directly.

The `bthresh` parameter exists for API compatibility with FSL
SUSAN's bilateral threshold but is currently advisory: setting it
clips the per-edge weight at the threshold rather than acting as a
hard cutoff.  (Hard-cutoff variants are straightforward to add if the
diagnostic value materialises.)
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-smoothing-susan-symbols}
:::
